name: part_012
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_012.webm

scenes.description: Outro monologue with credits scrolling. A librarian character speaks to the viewer.
Trailer for the Blu-ray release of Shirakami Fubuki's 1st Solo Live 'FBKINGDOM ANTHEM'.
Final illustration with messages and signatures from the cast.

subtitles.original: ハロウィンパーティー、いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How did you enjoy the Halloween party?

subtitles.original: ちゃんとこちら側の王国に戻ってこられていますか？
subtitles.english: Have you managed to return to the kingdom on this side safely?

subtitles.original: 冥界の女王様に気に入られてしまうと、魂を奪われてしまって帰ってこられませんからね。
subtitles.english: If the Queen of the Underworld takes a liking to you, she'll steal your soul, and you won't be able to come back.

subtitles.original: 戻ってこられてラッキーでした。…なんて。
subtitles.english: You were lucky to be able to return. ...Just kidding.

subtitles.original: あ、今日のお話はどうでしたか？
subtitles.english: Ah, how did you like today's stories?

subtitles.original: 楽しかったでしょうか？
subtitles.english: I hope they were fun.

subtitles.original: 私が特にお気に入りは、探偵のお話でして。
subtitles.english: My personal favorite was the detective story.

subtitles.original: 今回お聞かせできてとっても嬉しかったです。
subtitles.english: I was very happy to be able to share it with you.

subtitles.original: そうだ、いつかあなたのお話も聞かせてくださいね。
subtitles.english: That's right, please let me hear your stories someday too.

subtitles.original: もしかすると、あの本にあなたのお話も書き記されるかもしれませんよ。
subtitles.english: Who knows, your stories might even be recorded in that book one day.

subtitles.original: なんといっても、摩訶不思議な本ですから。
subtitles.english: After all, it is a very mysterious book.

subtitles.original: 何が起こるか、司書である私にも分かりません。
subtitles.english: Even as the librarian, I don't know what might happen.

subtitles.original: さて、そろそろお時間ですね。
subtitles.english: Well, it's about time.

subtitles.original: またお話が聞きたくなりましたら、
subtitles.english: If you ever wish to hear more stories,

subtitles.original: いつでもこの王国図書館へお越しください。
subtitles.english: please visit this Kingdom Library at any time.

subtitles.original: それでは。さようなら。
subtitles.english: Until then. Farewell.

subtitles.original: ハジマリはきっと ひとつの願い
subtitles.english: It surely begins with a single wish

subtitles.original: Shirakami Fubuki 1st Solo Live FBKINGDOM ANTHEM
subtitles.english: Shirakami Fubuki 1st Solo Live FBKINGDOM ANTHEM

subtitles.original: LIVE Blu-ray 発売決定！
subtitles.english: LIVE Blu-ray release confirmed!

subtitles.original: すこん部の皆さん！準備はできてますか？
subtitles.english: Everyone in Sukonbu! Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 『Say!ファンファーレ!』、いきますよ！
subtitles.english: 'Say! Fanfare!', here we go!

subtitles.original: せーの！ ほら どっか 行こう 顔上げて
subtitles.english: One, two! Look, let's go somewhere, lift your head

subtitles.original: みんなで手を取れば ハイ！
subtitles.english: If we all take hands, hey!

subtitles.original: まだまだ道半ば 世界を超えよう
subtitles.english: We're still only halfway there, let's go beyond the world

subtitles.original: ハイ！ ほら 推し推し様 止まらない
subtitles.english: Hey! Look, my dear oshi, won't stop

subtitles.original: 全力ですから！
subtitles.english: Because I'm giving it my all!

subtitles.original: 夢を書き換えたら
subtitles.english: If we rewrite our dreams,

subtitles.original: 追いかけ続けよう 共に繋ぐファンファーレ
subtitles.english: let's keep chasing them, the fanfare that connects us

subtitles.original: 宝物に気づか 自分自身の輝きを見失った時には
subtitles.english: Notice the treasure, when you've lost sight of your own sparkle

subtitles.original: 思い出してね 僕らの星座は 君がいるから輝く
subtitles.english: Please remember, our constellation shines because you are here

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah! 無数の星の中
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah! Amidst countless stars

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah! 光を君がくれた
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah! You gave me light

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah Yeah Yeah...
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah Yeah Yeah...

subtitles.original: もっと超えていけるさ
subtitles.english: We can go even further

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah! 超新星 起こせ今
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah! Cause a supernova right now

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah! 何度だって跳べる
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah! I can jump as many times as it takes

subtitles.original: Oh Yeah Yeah Yeah...
subtitles.english: Oh Yeah Yeah Yeah...

subtitles.original: これは紛れもなく僕らの奇跡
subtitles.english: This is undeniably our miracle

subtitles.original: Hi Friends!
subtitles.english: Hi Friends!

subtitles.original: Blu-ray 発売決定!! 詳細は後日！お楽しみに!!
subtitles.english: Blu-ray release confirmed!! Details coming soon! Look forward to it!!

subtitles.original: ベストウィッシュ！すこん部ー！
subtitles.english: Best wishes! Sukonbu!
